es.gob.fnmt.net

Class DroidHttpClient.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.net.DroidHttpClient.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    DroidHttpClient

    public static final class DroidHttpClient.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Java builder pattern class used to set DroidHttpClient parameters.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      DroidHttpClient.Builder addHeaderInfo(java.lang.String param, java.lang.String value)
      Add extra information to the header request.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder clientKeyStore(java.security.KeyStore clientKeyStore)
      Set certificate keystore for client authentication.
      DroidHttpClient done()
      Initialize SSL context and builds an http client instance.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder enableCustomRedirectHandler(boolean enabled)
      Set custom redirect handling requests in order to avoid infinite circular redirects.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder enableCustomResponseProcessCookies(boolean enable)
      Replace response interceptor by the custom one.
      javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory getSSLSocketFactory()
      Build and return a javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory object instance.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder keyManager(javax.net.ssl.KeyManager certificateKeyManager)
      Set key manager for retrieving the client certificate for authentication.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder keyManagerPolicy(KeyManagerPolicy certificateKeyManagerPolicy)
      Set key manager policies for retrieving the client certificate for authentication.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder protocol(java.lang.String protocol)
      Set protocol ("SSLv3", "TLSv1", ""TLSv1.1", "TLSv2", etc.).
      DroidHttpClient.Builder setCookiePolicy(DroidHttpClient.CookiePolicy cookiePolicy)
      Set the cookie policy: [CookiePolicy.RFC2965 (default) | CookiePolicy.BEST_MATCH | CookiePolicy.BROWSER_COMPATIBILITY].
      DroidHttpClient.Builder setResponseProcessCookies(ResponseProcessCookies responseProcessCookies)
      Set a user implementation handler for cookies management in request/response process.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder setTimeout(int timeout)
      Set the timeout for HTTP requests.
      DroidHttpClient.Builder trustKeyStore(java.security.KeyStore trustKeyStore)
      Set trusted CA (Certificate Authority) certificate keystore for server authentication.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • addHeaderInfo

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder addHeaderInfo(java.lang.String param,
                                             java.lang.String value)
        Add extra information to the header request.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • clientKeyStore

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder clientKeyStore(java.security.KeyStore clientKeyStore)
        Set certificate keystore for client authentication.
        Parameters:
        clientKeyStore - container with the client certificates for authentication.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • done

        public DroidHttpClient done()
                     throws java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                            java.security.KeyStoreException,
                            java.security.KeyManagementException,
                            javax.net.ssl.SSLException,
                            java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException,
                            java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        Initialize SSL context and builds an http client instance.
        Returns:
        DroidHttpClient instance.
        Throws:
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.security.KeyManagementException
        javax.net.ssl.SSLException
        java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException

      • enableCustomRedirectHandler

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder enableCustomRedirectHandler(boolean enabled)
        Set custom redirect handling requests in order to avoid infinite circular redirects.
        Parameters:
        enabled - true for enable, false for disable. Default is true.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • enableCustomResponseProcessCookies

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder enableCustomResponseProcessCookies(boolean enable)
        Replace response interceptor by the custom one.
        Parameters:
        enable - true for enable, false for disable. Default is true.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • getSSLSocketFactory

        public javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory getSSLSocketFactory()
                                                   throws java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException,
                                                          java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                          java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                          java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                          java.security.KeyManagementException
        Build and return a javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory object instance.
        Returns:
        SSLSocketFactory implementation.
        Throws:
        java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyManagementException

      • keyManager

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder keyManager(javax.net.ssl.KeyManager certificateKeyManager)
        Set key manager for retrieving the client certificate for authentication.
        Parameters:
        certificateKeyManager - instance of class that implements javax.net.ssl.KeyManager
        Returns:
        Builder.
        See Also:
        KeyManager

      • keyManagerPolicy

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder keyManagerPolicy(KeyManagerPolicy certificateKeyManagerPolicy)
        Set key manager policies for retrieving the client certificate for authentication. This will be overridden by keyManager method.
        Parameters:
        certificateKeyManagerPolicy - instance of class KeyManagerPolicy.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • protocol

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder protocol(java.lang.String protocol)
        Set protocol ("SSLv3", "TLSv1", ""TLSv1.1", "TLSv2", etc.).
        Parameters:
        protocol - SSL protocol as string.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • setCookiePolicy

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder setCookiePolicy(DroidHttpClient.CookiePolicy cookiePolicy)
        Set the cookie policy: [CookiePolicy.RFC2965 (default) | CookiePolicy.BEST_MATCH | CookiePolicy.BROWSER_COMPATIBILITY].
        Parameters:
        cookiePolicy -
        Returns:

      • setResponseProcessCookies

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder setResponseProcessCookies(ResponseProcessCookies responseProcessCookies)
        Set a user implementation handler for cookies management in request/response process.
        Parameters:
        responseProcessCookies -
        Returns:

      • setTimeout

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder setTimeout(int timeout)
        Set the timeout for HTTP requests.
        Parameters:
        timeout - in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        Builder.

      • trustKeyStore

        public DroidHttpClient.Builder trustKeyStore(java.security.KeyStore trustKeyStore)
        Set trusted CA (Certificate Authority) certificate keystore for server authentication.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStore - container with the server CA certificates.
        Returns:
        Builder.
